section.heading: Supervised credit
section.chapeau: The Secretary shall provide adequate training to employees of the Farmers Home Administration on credit analysis and financial and farm management to—

paragraph.content: better acquaint the employees with what constitutes adequate financial data on which to base a direct or guaranteed loan approval decision; and
ensure proper supervision of farmer program loans.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 87–128, title III, § 361, as added Pub. L. 101–624, title XVIII, § 1820, Nov. 28, 1990, 104 Stat. 3830.)
